scripts.copy-dbs: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='../backend';const files=fs.existsSync(src)?fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.db')):[];if(!files.length){console.log('No DB files to copy.');process.exit(0);}for(const f of files){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join('.',f));}"
scripts.copy-backend-config: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='../backend';const files=fs.existsSync(src)?fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')||f.endsWith('.pem')):[];if(!files.length){console.log('No backend config assets to copy.');process.exit(0);}for(const f of files){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join('.',f));}"
scripts.copy-dist: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='../frontend/frontend/dist/frontend/browser';const dst='dist/browser';fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.error('Source dist not found: '+src);process.exit(1);}for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(src)){fs.cpSync(path.join(src,entry),path.join(dst,entry),{recursive:true,force:true});}"
scripts.build-backend: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const hasOld=fs.existsSync('./backend')||fs.existsSync('./backend.exe');const goNames=process.platform==='win32'?['go.exe','go']:['go'];const candidates=[];if(process.env.GOROOT){for(const name of goNames){candidates.push(path.join(process.env.GOROOT,'bin',name));}}candidates.push(...goNames);let goCmd='';for(const candidate of candidates){const check=spawnSync(candidate,['version'],{stdio:'ignore',shell:false});if(check.status===0){goCmd=candidate;break;}}if(!goCmd){if(hasOld){console.log('Go not found; using existing backend binary.');process.exit(0);}console.error('Go is not installed and no backend binary is present. Install Go from https://go.dev/dl/ then rerun npm run build-and-start.');process.exit(1);}const out=process.platform==='win32'?'../electron/backend.exe':'../electron/backend';const build=spawnSync(goCmd,['build','-o',out,'.'],{cwd:'../backend',stdio:'inherit',shell:false});process.exit(build.status??1);"
scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {spawn}=require('child_process');const cli='node_modules/electron/cli.js';if(!fs.existsSync(cli)){console.error('Electron is not installed locally. Fix TLS trust and run: npm install --save-dev electron');process.exit(1);}const child=spawn(process.execPath,[cli,'.'],{stdio:'inherit'});child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code??0));"
scripts.build: npm run clean-all && npm run build-angular-prod && npm run copy-dist && npm run build-backend && npm run copy-dbs && npm run copy-backend-config && npm run start
